zh.lifeSummary: 當Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire於大約1110年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Llywelyn ap LLywelyn37歲，母親Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn32歲。她於大約1125年與Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan在威爾士結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在威爾士布雷康史爾格林塔維，埋葬在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾格林塔維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire于大约1110年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Llywelyn ap LLywelyn37岁，母亲Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn32岁。她于大约1125年与Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan在威尔士结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在威尔士布雷康史爾格林塔維，埋葬在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾格林塔維。

nameMeanings.name: Mallt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Maud , a common name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: LLywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire was born about 1110, in Wales, her father, Llywelyn ap LLywelyn, was 37 and her mother, Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn, was 32. She married Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan about 1125, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales, and was buried in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire est née environ 1110, à Galles, son père, Llywelyn ap LLywelyn, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan environ 1125, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, et a été enterrée à Glyntawe, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire um 1110 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywelyn ap LLywelyn 37 und ihre Mutter Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn 32. Sie hat um 1125 in Wales Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales und wurde in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire è nata il circa 1110 nel Galles, sua padre, Llywelyn ap LLywelyn, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan circa 1125, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, e fu sepolta a Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshireが約1110年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Llywelyn ap LLywelynは37歳，母Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelynは32歳であった。約1125年にウェールズでCydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はウェールズブレコンシュアイアグリンタウで死去し，イギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアグリンタウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire(이)가 대략 1110년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywelyn ap LLywelyn(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1125년 웨일스에서 Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 브레콘실르 그린타베에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 그린타베에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire nasceu aproximadamente 1110, em Gales, seu pai, Llywelyn ap LLywelyn, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan aproximadamente 1125, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, e foi sepultada em Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire родилась около 1110 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Llywelyn ap LLywelyn было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan около 1125 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности глинтав, брекуншир, Уэльс и была похоронена в местности глинтав, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire nació aproximadamente 1110, en Gales, su papá, Llywelyn ap LLywelyn, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mes. Llywelyn sap LLywelyn, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan aproximadamente 1125, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, y fue sepultada en Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
